text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Splendid! It seems like you're steadily
collecting trophies!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text: Ha-ha-ha! Just as I expected of you!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Many thanks! We're one step closer to
my boundless dream!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
However! The present amount of
trophies is not enough to fill this room
with brilliance!

text_block_list.name: Director Akikawa
text_block_list.text:
Continue on! I'm counting on you to
keep up the good work!
